name: vp_correlation_risk
description: VIRTUAL/AIXBT pair correlation risk analysis. Calculates spread Z-score, rolling correlation, and mean-reversion signals using statistical arbitrage framework. Reports current pair risk level (SAFE/WARNING/DANGER), Z-score based trade signals (LONG/SHORT/EXIT/NEUTRAL), and correlation breakdown alerts. Essential for agents holding multiple VP tokens to manage correlated exposure.

lookback_days.description: Lookback period in days for spread and correlation calculation (7-90)

z_entry.description: Z-score threshold to signal pair trade entry

z_exit.description: Z-score threshold to signal position exit (mean reversion)
